publications.title: Quantifying uncertainty in climate change impacts: A Bayesian approach for the Cagayan river basin
publications.description: This study develops a probabilistic flood-impact assessment for the Cagayan river basin (northern Luzon, Philippines) by linking Bayesian extreme-value inference with uncertainty propagation along the rainfall–flood–damage chain.

publications.title: Ready of not? Hurricane preparedness, response, and recovery of farms, forests, and rural communities in the U.S. Caribbean
publications.description: This study highlights that forest owners, and rural communities in the Caribbean are among the groups most vulnerable to hurricanes and other extreme climate events.

publications.title: Radiotherapy continuity for cancer treatment: Lessons learned from natural disasters
publications.description: This study examines the impact of natural disasters on the continuity of radiotherapy services, a critical component of cancer treatment responsible for managing one of the world's leading causes of death.

publications.title: Characterizing changes in postfire debris-flow hazard as burned areas recover
publications.description: Updating post-fire debris-flow hazard thresholds with satellite-tracked vegetation recovery reduces false alarms and improves predictions for years 2 and 3 after a wildfire.

publications.title: Are the poor more exposed to climate hazards in Latin America?
publications.description: This paper addresses two main questions. First, what proportion of people are exposed to climate hazards in Latin America and the Caribbean, especially among the poor versus the nonpoor?

publications.title: Disaster risk financing: Annual report 2025
publications.description: The report provides deep dives into the DRF programmes in each country, as well as stories from the field, interviews with partners and insights into how WFP promotes the use of pre-arranged financing.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Sendai
publications.description: This landscape study assesses how SMEs in Sendai city  perceive climate change and disaster risks and how they assess the resilience of their companies and the cities in which they operate.

publications.title: Seeing the hazard: Effects of visual communication in flood warning messages
publications.description: The study examines how visual cues, especially maps and warning symbols, can improve flood early warning messages by helping citizens understand event magnitude, timing, impacts and recommended protective actions.

publications.title: The value of forecasters-in-the-loop in real-time flood forecasting in the age of machine learning
publications.description: ML models for hydrological forecasting, even when given perfect inputs, cannot yet match the reliability of experienced human forecasters operating real-world prediction systems.

publications.title: UNDRR Annual Report 2025
publications.description: The UNDRR Annual Report 2025 presents several important achievements that UNDRR marked in the year 2025

publications.title: When digital systems fail: An expert report on the hidden risks of our digital world
publications.description: This expert report examines how digital infrastructure, now central to essential services such as healthcare, finance, and emergency response, is creating new forms of systemic risk through increasing interdependence.

publications.title: UNDRR Regional Office for Africa Quarterly Newsletter (Jan-Mar 2026)
publications.description: UNDRR's Regional Office for Africa has published its first quarterly newsletter of 2026, detailing the major achievements of the work being done by the organisation.

publications.title: Teaching resilience with the Stop Disasters game: a teacher's guide
publications.description: This Teacher’s Pack supports the use of the  Stop Disasters online game as a practical way to introduce disaster risk reduction (DRR) and resilience in the classroom.

publications.title: Concept note: The International day in memory of the victims of earthquakes
publications.description: The international day provides an annual opportunity for remembrance and renewed commitment to protecting lives and livelihoods from earthquake disasters.

publications.title: Study on the reach and effectiveness of Early Warning Systems in Timor-Leste
publications.description: This study evaluates the effectiveness of early warning systems in Timor-Leste, based on household surveys and focus group discussions across eight municipalities and key informant interviews with national, municipal and community stakeholders.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of MSMEs in Barbados
publications.description: Strengthening the Disaster Resilience of MSMEs in Barbados

publications.title: Strengthening disaster resilience of SMEs through business continuity planning – Guidance and Templates
publications.description: This resource supports SMEs, including microenterprises, in developing a basic business continuity plan, with the aim of progressively aligning with leading international standards, particularly ISO 22301:2019 on business continuity management systems

publications.title: Sendai Framework Monitoring in Europe and Central Asia: A regional snapshot
publications.description: This report offers a snapshot of the aggregated data reported by Member States across the Europe and Central Asia region. It is based on data reported in the SFM system by 20 July 2025, following a previous edition of this report released in December 2020
